name: mimo
description: Use MiMo Code from Codex to review code or delegate tasks. Provides code review, task delegation, and background job management through MiMo CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate tasks and code reviews to MiMo
interface.longDescription: MiMo Code integration for Codex. Run code reviews, delegate investigation and fix tasks, manage background jobs — all through MiMo CLI.
